The '''63rd''' annual [[Berlin International Film Festival]] took place in Berlin, Germany, between 7 and 17 February 2013.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/01_jahresblatt_2013/01_jahresblatt_2013.html |title=Berlinale |access-date=13 December 2012|work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140407135758/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/01_jahresblatt_2013/01_jahresblatt_2013.html| archive-date=7 April 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref> Chinese film director [[Wong Kar-wai]] was announced as the president of the jury<ref name="JURY">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/04_jury_2013/04_jury_2013.html |title=JURIES 2013 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20140605054157/https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/04_jury_2013/04_jury_2013.html| archive-date=5 June 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref> and his film ''[[The Grandmaster (film)|The Grandmaster]]'' was the opening film of the festival.<ref name="reuters">{{Cite web|url=http://uk.reuters.com/article/uk-berlin-idUKBRE91600120130207 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160307164833/http://uk.reuters.com/article/uk-berlin-idUKBRE91600120130207 |url-status=dead |archive-date=7 March 2016 |title=Martial arts drama kicks off Berlin film festival |access-date=7 February 2013 |work=reuters}}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[Child's Pose (film)|Child's Pose]]'' directed by [[Călin Peter Netzer]], which also served as the closing film.<ref name="BerlinPrizes">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/03_preistraeger_2013/03_preistraeger_2013.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2013|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140105044335/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/03_preistraeger_2013/03_preistraeger_2013.html| archive-date=5 January 2014 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref name="BBCBerlin">{{Cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/world-europe-21485735 |title=Romanian film Child's Pose wins Golden Bear in Berlin |access-date=16 February 2013 |work=BBC News|date=16 February 2013 }}</ref>

The French documentary filmmaker [[Claude Lanzmann]] was awarded with the [[Honorary Golden Bear]].<ref name="Lanzmann">{{Cite web|url=http://www.screendaily.com/news/claude-lanzmann-to-receive-berlins-honorary-golden-bear/5049510.article |title=Claude Lanzmann to receive Berlin's Honorary Golden Bear |access-date=13 December 2012 |work=screendaily}}</ref> Italian actress [[Isabella Rossellini]] and German film director [[Rosa von Praunheim]] were awarded with the Berlinale Camera.

== Juries ==
[[File:Wong Kar-Wai (Berlin Film Festival 2013).jpg|thumb|220x220px|[[Wong Kar-wai]], jury president, along with his wife at the festival]]The following people were on the jury for the festival:<ref name="JURY" />

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Wong Kar-wai]], Chinese/Hong Kong filmmaker and producer - President of the jury
* [[Susanne Bier]], Danish filmmaker
* [[Andreas Dresen]], German filmmaker
* [[Ellen Kuras]], American filmmaker and director of photography
* [[Shirin Neshat]], Iranian visual artist and filmmaker
* [[Tim Robbins]], American actor, filmmaker and producer
* [[Athina Rachel Tsangari]], Greek filmmaker and producer

=== First Feature Award ===
* [[Oren Moverman]], Israeli filmmaker and producer
* [[Taika Waititi]], New Zealand actor and filmmaker
* [[Lucy Walker (director)|Lucy Walker]], British filmmaker

=== Short Films Competition ===
* [[Javier Fesser]], Spanish filmmaker
* Hyung-sook Hong, South Korean filmmaker
* Susanne Pfeffer, German art historian and curator

== Official Sections ==

===Main Competition===
The following films were selected for the main competition for the [[Golden Bear]] and [[Silver Bear]] awards:<ref name="PROGRAMME">{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/02_programm_2013/02_programm_2013.html |title=PROGRAMME 2013|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131109155643/https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2013/02_programm_2013/02_programm_2013.html| archive-date=9 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/berlin-2013-denis-cote-vic-and-flo-saw-a-bear-412166 |title=Berlin 2013: Denis Côté's 'Vic and Flo Saw a Bear' in Competition |access-date=17 January 2013 |work=hollywoodreporter|date=14 January 2013 }}</ref>

==Official Awards==
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Child's Pose (film)|Child's Pose]]'' by [[Călin Peter Netzer]]<ref name="BerlinCompleteAwards">{{Cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/63_ifb/63_Berlinale_Awards.pdf |title=The Awards of the 63rd Berlin International Film Festival |access-date=5 September 2013 |work=berlinale |archive-date=13 May 2013 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130513042435/http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/63_ifb/63_Berlinale_Awards.pdf |url-status=dead }}</ref><ref name="BerlinPrizes" />
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[An Episode in the Life of an Iron Picker]]'' by [[Danis Tanović]]
* [[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: ''[[Vic and Flo Saw a Bear]]'' by [[Denis Côté]]
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[David Gordon Green]] for ''[[Prince Avalanche]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Paulina García]] for ''[[Gloria (2013 film)|Gloria]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Nazif Mujić]] for ''[[An Episode in the Life of an Iron Picker]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: [[Jafar Panahi]] for ''[[Closed Curtain]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution]]: Aziz Zhambakiyev for ''[[Harmony Lessons]]''
* '''Special Mentions''':
** ''[[Promised Land (2012 film)|Promised Land]]'' by [[Gus Van Sant]]
** ''[[Layla Fourie]]'' by [[Pia Marais]]

== Independent awards ==

=== Ecumenical Jury Prize ===
* ''[[The Act of Killing]]'' by [[Joshua Oppenheimer]] (Panorama)
* ''[[Circles (film)|Circles]]'' by [[Srdan Golubović]] (Forum)

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics|FIPRESCI]] Jury Prize ===

* ''Hélio Oiticica'' by Cesar Oiticica Filho

=== Panorama Audience Award ===
* ''[[The Act of Killing]]'' by [[Joshua Oppenheimer]]

=== Forum ===
* '''NETPAC Award Best Asian Film''': ''[[When I Saw You (film)|When I Saw You]]'' by [[Annemarie Jacir]]
* '''C.I.C.A.E. Jury Prize''': ''[[In Bloom (2013 film)|In Bloom]]'' by [[Nana Ekvtimishvili]], Simon Groß
